title: U-Boot package changelog and source metadata audit
findings: Installed u-boot-aw2501/u-boot-radxa-a733 changelog records 2018.07-12 through 2018.07-17 mostly as chore: update submodules.
No changelog entry names MMC, SDMMC, SMHC, IDMAC, NSI, MBUS, firewall, or A733 storage fabric changes after the active on-card 2018.07-12 firmware.
Installed documentation does not provide submodule SHAs or a specific explanation for the Jan 2026 to Apr 2026 U-Boot payload difference.
decision: No kernel patch and no bootloader experiment justified from changelog text alone. The newer installed payload remains a possible controlled bootloader A/B test, but it is not evidence of an SDMMC0 IDMAC fix.
next: If pursuing this path, inspect the radxa-pkg/u-boot-aw2501 repository tags/submodules for 2018.07-12 vs 2018.07-17, or test the newer bootloader as an explicitly separate bootloader experiment.
